description: Export all records from the 'socioboard' database's 'published_posts' collection where the 'published_date' is prior to January 1, 2023 (2023-01-01T00:00:00.000Z). Save the exported records as a compressed JSON archive at ~/Archives/posts_pre_2023.json.gz. After the export is successfully archived, permanently delete these historical records from the 'published_posts' collection.
